files.content: Main security scanner: STRIDE checks (8), PHI encryption validation, access audit schema verification, dependency CVE scan via pip-audit, CycloneDX SBOM generation. CLI: python3 security_audit/security_scanner.py [--sbom-out] [--report-out]. Exit 0 = all CRITICAL/HIGH pass; exit 1 = failures present.

Full STRIDE threat model: 6 categories, 12 threats, 5 trust boundaries, 6 assets, residual risk register, HIPAA/NIST SP 800-53 compliance mapping. Covers T-S-01/02 (Spoofing), T-T-01/02 (Tampering), T-R-01 (Repudiation), T-I-01/02/03/04 (Information Disclosure), T-D-01/02 (Denial of Service), T-E-01/02 (Elevation of Privilege).

CycloneDX 1.5 SBOM. 154 Python runtime components enumerated via importlib.metadata. Includes purl (pkg:pypi/<name>@<version>), license metadata, and origin URLs. Serial: urn:uuid:25f548f3-be69-48e9-950d-c7b282c1e163. Generated: 2026-03-27T22:31:56Z.
Live scan output. 10 checks total: 4 PASS, 4 FAIL, 2 WARN. 3 CRITICAL/HIGH fails requiring remediation before production PHI deployment (see findings below).

references: OWASP Top 10 2021 — A01 Broken Access Control, A02 Cryptographic Failures, A03 Injection, A05 Security Misconfiguration, A07 Auth Failures
NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5 — AC-2, AU-3, AU-9, SC-8, SC-28, SI-10
NIST SP 800-111 — Guide to Storage Encryption
CWE-200 Information Exposure, CWE-269 Privilege Escalation, CWE-287 Authentication, CWE-312 PHI at Rest, CWE-319 PHI in Transit
IEC 62443-3-3 — Industrial Automation & Control Systems Security
standard_clauses_covered: NIST SP 800-53 AU-3 — Audit Record Content
NIST SP 800-53 AU-9 — Protection of Audit Information
NIST SP 800-53 SC-28 — Protection of Information at Rest
NIST SP 800-53 SI-10 — Information Input Validation

findings_requiring_remediation.title: Audit log contains UPDATE/DELETE statements
findings_requiring_remediation.root_cause: audit_logger.py includes a Delete/DELETE SQL path (likely for cleanup/migration). Compliance requires the event table to be append-only.
findings_requiring_remediation.remediation: Remove UPDATE/DELETE from audit_logger.py event table logic. Use a separate maintenance table for any cleanup operations, never the event rows.

findings_requiring_remediation.title: Audit schema missing trace_id or actor field
findings_requiring_remediation.root_cause: The audit_logger.py CREATE TABLE statement does not include all mandatory non-repudiation fields required by HIPAA §164.312(b).
findings_requiring_remediation.remediation: Add trace_id TEXT NOT NULL and actor TEXT NOT NULL columns to the CREATE TABLE statement. Populate from X-Trace-ID header and UserIdentity.sub on every event.

findings_requiring_remediation.title: No PHI encryption-at-rest configuration detected
findings_requiring_remediation.root_cause: config.yaml lacks encryption.at_rest: true and SAGE_ENCRYPT_AT_REST env var is not set. SQLite .db files written to .sage/ are unencrypted on disk.
findings_requiring_remediation.remediation: Option A (preferred): Enable OS-level filesystem encryption (LUKS on Linux, BitLocker on Windows) for the .sage/ directory. Set encryption.at_rest: true in config.yaml to signal encrypted deployment. Option B: Integrate SQLCipher (pysqlcipher3) for application-layer encryption. Provide key via SAGE_DB_ENCRYPTION_KEY env var.

findings_requiring_remediation.title: Audit log schema missing required fields
findings_requiring_remediation.root_cause: Same root cause as STRIDE-R-01. actor/user_id field absent from CREATE TABLE in audit_logger.py.
findings_requiring_remediation.remediation: Align with STRIDE-R-01 remediation — add actor, trace_id fields. Schema migration: ALTER TABLE audit_log ADD COLUMN actor TEXT; for existing databases.

warnings.title: No application-level rate limiting
warnings.note: Production deployments should add slowapi middleware. WAF rate limiting at infra layer is acceptable as interim mitigation.

warnings.title: TLS in transit: PASS (reference in config.yaml)
warnings.note: TLS detected via config reference. Verify reverse-proxy enforces TLS 1.2+ with HSTS header in deployment.

acceptance_criteria_status.AC1_stride_all_categories: PASS — all 6 STRIDE categories covered in threat_model.yaml and scanner
acceptance_criteria_status.AC2_no_critical_high_vulns: FAIL — 3 CRITICAL/HIGH findings require remediation before PHI production deployment
acceptance_criteria_status.AC3_sbom_generated: PASS — CycloneDX 1.5 SBOM generated with 154 components at security_audit/sbom.json
acceptance_criteria_status.AC4_phi_encryption: PARTIAL — in-transit PASS (TLS config present); at-rest FAIL (no encryption.at_rest config)
acceptance_criteria_status.AC5_audit_logging: FAIL — audit schema missing actor/trace_id fields; UPDATE/DELETE present in audit_logger.py

items: Remove DELETE from audit_logger.py event table (STRIDE-T-01, AUDIT-01) — 1 day
Add actor + trace_id columns to audit schema (STRIDE-R-01, AUDIT-01) — 1 day
Enable filesystem encryption for .sage/ in deployment runbook (STRIDE-I-02) — 2 days
Set encryption.at_rest: true in config.yaml + document SAGE_ENCRYPT_AT_REST — 0.5 days
Add slowapi rate limiting middleware to api.py (STRIDE-D-01) — 1 day
Integrate pip-audit into CI/CD pipeline for continuous dependency scanning — 0.5 days
